ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address where the incident occurred */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the incident was responded to */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., Shooting or Violent Incident) */,
  "time_of_day" TEXT /* Time of day when the incident occurred */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the incident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the incident location */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident */,
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the victim involved in the incident */,
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the suspect involved in the incident */,
  "witness_id" INTEGER /* ID of the witness involved in the incident */,
  "evidence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evidence related to the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_evidence_id FOREIGN KEY ("evidence_id") REFERENCES evidence ("evidence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_incident_type FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_neighborhood FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_victim_id FOREIGN KEY ("victim_id") REFERENCES victims ("victim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_suspect_id FOREIGN KEY ("suspect_id") REFERENCES suspects ("suspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_witness_id FOREIGN KEY ("witness_id") REFERENCES witnesses ("witness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Overall crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_types" (
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident type */,
  "incident_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the incident type (e.g., Shooting or Violent Incident) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Broad category of the incident type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "officer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the officer */,
  "Badge_number" INTEGER /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the officer */,
  "assigned_vehicle" TEXT /* Vehicle assigned to the officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being reported */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer submitting the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was submitted */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident report */,
  "attachments" TEXT /* File paths or URLs to any attachments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("officer_id") REFERENCES officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the report status (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime statistic */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood */,
  "incident_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident type */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of incidents */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the statistic */,
  "monthly_count" INTEGER /* Monthly count of incidents */,
  "yearly_count" INTEGER /* Yearly count of incidents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_incident_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_type_id") REFERENCES incident_types ("incident_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_statistics_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, administrator) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., official, public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_comments_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "victims" (
  "victim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each victim */,
  "victim_name" TEXT /* Name of the victim */,
  "victim_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the victim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("victim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suspects" (
  "suspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspect */,
  "suspect_name" TEXT /* Name of the suspect */,
  "suspect_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the suspect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "witnesses" (
  "witness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each witness */,
  "witness_name" TEXT /* Name of the witness */,
  "witness_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the witness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("witness_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidence" (
  "evidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of evidence */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence (e.g., photo, video, document) */,
  "evidence_details" TEXT /* Details about the evidence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidence_id")
)
